news.t: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands Growing ETF Suite; Launches the Harbor AlphaEdge Large Cap-Value ETF and Harbor AlphaEdge Next Generation REITs ETF

holdings.infoBox: VLLU is an equity ETF with a total of 77 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 6.17%, Johnson & Johnson at 4.74%, Micron Technology at 4.15%, Mueller Industries at 3.21%, and Citigroup at 3.07%.

overview.description: The Harbor AlphaEdge Large Cap Value ETF (VLLU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Harbor AlphaEdge Large Cap Value index. The fund tracks an index that targets attractively valued large-cap US stocks. The fund employs a proprietary model and optimizer that uses fundamental and technical factors in selecting and weighting securities. VLLU was launched on Aug 20, 2024 and is issued by Harbor.
infoTable: Harbor AlphaEdge Large Cap Value Index

data.title: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands Growing ETF Suite; Launches the Harbor AlphaEdge Large Cap-Value ETF and Harbor AlphaEdge Next Generation REITs ETF
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors, Inc. ("Harbor"), an asset manager that curates a suite of actively-managed ETFs, mutual funds, and collective investment trusts, is expanding its sui...
